wikis shouldn't be stored in some weird path -- they should be in the project dir itself under ./docs/wiki/

Done. Summary of changes:

- **`wiki.rs`**: `wiki_dir(project_root)` now returns `project_root/docs/wiki` instead of `proj_dir/wiki` (external context dir). Updated the storage layout comment.
- **`statusline.rs`**: Passes `root` (project root) to `wiki_dir` directly; removed now-unused `project_context_dir` import.
- **`inject.rs`**: Same — uses `root` directly, removed `project_context_dir` import.
- **`autodoc.rs`**: Uses `root` for wiki path; keeps `proj_dir` for attempts/index.db.
- **`capture.rs`**: Derives `project_root` from `input.cwd` for wiki path; keeps `proj_dir` for db and open-questions.json.
- **`archeologist.rs`**: Derives `project_root` from `cwd` for wiki path; keeps `proj_dir` for context state.

The `~/.proactive-context/projects/<normalized>/` directory still exists for daemon state (`index.db`, `daemon.pid`, etc.) — only the wiki moved. Existing wiki files at the old location won't auto-migrate; you'd need to `mv ~/.proactive-context/projects/<normalized>/wiki/ <project_root>/docs/wiki/` for each project.

Clean. Here's what was migrated:

| Project | Guides |
|---|---|
| `src/proactive-context` | 118 |
| `Work/nostr-multi-platform` | 80 |
| `Work/podcast-player` | 16 |
| `Work/nostr-multi-platform/android` | 5 |
| `src/pc-wikitest` | 3 |
| `Work/win-the-day-app` | 2 |

Used `cp -n` (no-clobber), so old files at `~/.proactive-context/projects/*/wiki/` are still there as a backup. The worktree entries (2–7 guides each, in `.claude_worktrees_*` dirs) were skipped since their content overlaps with the main project wikis — let me know if you want those folded in too.
